subcodes.first_line: He Who was inscribed by the Most Exalted Pen in the Sacred Scrolls and Tablets hath come. This is the Day wherein God hath given glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی من کان مرقوما من القلم الاعلی فی الزبر و الالواح هذا یوم فیه بشر الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @suffering and imprisonment
